channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Non electric vehicle blocking electric only bay, 10th July
item.description:
Non electric vehicle blocking electric only bay

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goodchild Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked approx 8.45pm Friday 10 July, 10th July
item.description:
Fiemrst noticed when through my open 1st floor window I heard a commotion outside in the street, when I looked there were a number of dog walkers negotiating getting around the parked car. I realised it's likely to be a hazard to a regular mobility user and at least 2 double buggy users, hence my reporting it now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitefoot Lane, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven pavement caused by leak, 10th July
item.description:
This problem was caused by a water pipe leak. The pavements in Slades Drive have been uneven in multiple places on Slades Drive this warrants inspection. I believe this information has been passed onto Bromley. There was also water left in the hole after the leak had been fixed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Slades Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction, 10th July
item.description:
I am writing to formally report a serious parking obstruction that is currently preventing residents from exiting the estate. Two vehicles have been parked in a manner that completely blocks the access route and yellow hatched safety lines, causing a total gridlock for other parked cars.Please find the urgent details of the obstruction below:Location: [hampton street ( residential estate Date and Time: 10/07/2026 at 21:15] Vehicle 1: White Audi A4 Avant (Station Wagon) – Registration: RA73 HWL Vehicle 2: Black Nissan Qashqai (SUV) – Registration: DS69 GYZ Description of Issue: Both vehicles are illegally parked inside the yellow hatched road markings, entirely blocking the thoroughfare. There is absolutely no clearance for other vehicles to navigate past them, making it impossible for resident cars to exit the estate. This also presents a major safety hazard as it entirely blocks access for emergency services.I have attached a photograph of the situation demonstrating the exact positions of the vehicles and the obstruction caused.Given that this is a total obstruction blocking vehicles from leaving, I request an urgent vehicle check and towing enforcement/fine issuance as soon as possible.Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canterbury Place, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cleared at midday, more stuff by evening, 10th July
item.description:
Mattress dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th July
item.description:
Double mattress has been fly tipped on residential street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heatherside Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full bins and other dumped rubbish, 10th July
item.description:
Both bins are full and overflowing. Plus there is dumped litter on the other side of the grassed area too. If I had any thick bin liners at home I’d come back to clean up what I could but I don’t have any at the moment.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mycenae Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcases rubbish and house hold items fly tipped at Linslade house bins please remove, 10th July
item.description:
Suitcases rubbish and house hold items fly tipped at Linslade house bins please remove It’s been here over a week and is gross thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th July
item.description:
Lots of household rubbish dumped around Denham street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Denham Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and rubbish dumped on street near traid bin, 10th July
item.description:
Near traid bin by Pendley house been here a week mattress and loads of rubbish and clothes dumped pls remove asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign twisted, 10th July
item.description:
The school sign outside 4 Shepperton Road is twisted and not visible to traffic. Presumably it should face traffic approaching Towncourt Lane?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Shepperton Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Mattresses, 10th July
item.description:
2 mattresses have been dumped on the pavement in Lloyds Way. The path is blocked so people have to walk on road to pass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lloyds Way, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 10th July
item.description:
Gym weights dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grace Mews, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Branch hanging off tree, 10th July
item.description:
The branch could be cut off

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Timbercroft Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full litter bin - dog waste health hazard, 10th July
item.description:
The bin needs to be emptied immediately it is full of dog waste bags and these are now on the floor this is a recurring issue and is not acceptable it is a health hazard . Why does it have to take multiple complaints for it to be cleared up. IT IS WHAT OUR COUNCIL TAX SHOULD BE PAYING FOR… clear it up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Youths broke this tree, 10th July
item.description:
Kids damaged the growing tree that was planted here 2-3 years ago? They broke the first one closer to jessup close about a year ago.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walker Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Van with no plates., 10th July
item.description:
A van with smashed drivers side window and no plates was dumped facing number 62 Place Farm Avenue blocking the footpath behind it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Place Farm Avenue, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge overgrown and blocking pavement, 10th July
item.description:
Please cut hedge. Hit head every day. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Bolton Gardens, South Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cooking oil on pavement, 10th July
item.description:
A group of teenagers threw cooking oil on the pavement and a few people almost fell.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle parked blocking pavement, 10th July
item.description:
Pedestrians having to walk into the path of oncoming traffic to get around the obstacle

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Berber Parade, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
